activation_sets.description: Run the Gamenator large lane on GPT-OSS 120B GGUF while keeping the Gemma 4 26B A4B mini lane available for game review.
Run the Gamenator large lane on Qwen3.6 35B while keeping the Gemma 4 26B A4B mini lane available for game review.
Gemma 4 31B GGUF at full 252K context. Consumes full single-box VRAM; mini lane is dark.
GGUF Gemma 4 26B A4B on large (252K ctx) + Gemma 4 26B A4B mini reviewer on :7999.
Gemma 4 31B GGUF on large + Qwen3.6 35B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
Qwen3 Next 80B A3B GGUF on large lane only. Mini lane dark to maximize VRAM.
Qwen3 Next 80B large + Gemma 4 26B A4B GGUF mini reviewer on :7999.
Qwen3 Next 80B large + Qwen3.6 35B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
Qwen3 Next 80B large + DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 32B mini reasoning lane on :7999.
Qwen3 Coder Next GGUF on large lane only. Bonzai default target. Mini dark.
Qwen3 Coder Next large + Gemma 4 26B A4B mini reviewer on :7999.
Qwen3 Coder Next large + Qwen3.6 35B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
Qwen3 235B A22B NVFP4 dual-box TRT-LLM. Occupies both spark-f147 and gx10-b041. Mini dark.
Qwen3 235B dual-box large + Gemma 4 26B A4B mini reviewer on :7999.
Qwen3 235B dual-box large + Qwen3.6 35B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
Llama 3.3 70B FP4 dual-box TRT-LLM. Both boxes occupied. Mini dark.
Llama 3.3 70B dual-box large + Gemma 4 26B A4B mini reviewer on :7999.
Llama 3.3 70B dual-box large + Qwen3.6 35B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
GPT-OSS 120B GGUF on the large lane. Preferred replacement for the older TRT dual-box lane.
NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super 120B A12B NVFP4 dual-box TRT-LLM. Both boxes occupied. Mini dark.
Qwen3.6 35B A3B GGUF on the large lane. Single-box bakeoff path.
Qwen3.6 35B GGUF on large + Gemma 4 26B A4B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
Qwen3.6 35B GGUF on large + Qwen3.6 35B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
GPT-OSS 20B GGUF on the large lane. Fastest single-box OSS bakeoff path.
GPT-OSS 120B GGUF on large + Gemma 4 26B A4B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
GPT-OSS 120B GGUF on large + Qwen3.6 35B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
Qwen3.5 122B A10B GGUF on the large lane. Single-box bench path used in bakeoff.
Qwen3.5 122B GGUF on large + Gemma 4 26B A4B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
Qwen3.5 122B GGUF on large + Qwen3.6 35B GGUF reviewer on :7999.
MiniMax M2.7 UD-IQ4_XS GGUF on the large lane. Heavy single-box bench path.
Gemma 4 26B A4B GGUF on the large lane. Fast single-box Gemma path.

large.description: Primary large-model lane on spark. Intended for one large profile at a time.

mini.description: Secondary lane on spark. Only mini models (32B or less) may run here.

fleet_profiles.notes: Gemma 26 A4B on spark plus DeepSeek 32B on gx10. TRT mini lane retired.

profiles.notes: Fast fallback and bonzai target on the large lane.
Large single-box GGUF lane on spark.
Retired Gemma 4 31B TRT lane. Kept only as historical metadata; do not publish or select for new runs.
Single-box Gemma 4 31B GGUF lane on spark. Includes local mmproj sidecar for image understanding. Kept as fallback; prefer trt_single_gemma4_31b_large.
Mini-lane Gemma reviewer profile on :7999. Uses the proven local GGUF artifact at 32K context without the mmproj sidecar by default.
Retired mini TRT lane. Replaced by the current Qwen3.6 large + Gemma 4 26B A4B mini GGUF path.
Retired mini TRT lane. Replaced by the current Qwen3.6 large + Gemma 4 26B A4B mini GGUF path.
Retired GPT-OSS 120B TRT lane. Kept only as historical/container metadata; do not publish or select for new runs.
profiles.runtime_notes: Retired from live selection after the GPT-OSS 120B GGUF lane replaced it.

profiles.notes: Dual-box TRT lane wired per local controller policy. Keep the initial recipe conservative at 65536 tokens until the two-box path is proven locally.
Reserves both boxes and serves through spark:8000.
Guarded dual-box restore profile. Use only on the exact rc3 / 32768 / :8000 recipe.
Mini lane default. Keep reserved for Alpha unless explicitly overridden later.
Single-box Qwen3.6 GGUF wired from the bakeoff path. Proven at 128K/262K on spark.
Qwen3.6 mini reviewer lane on :7999. Same model family as the large lane, scoped for combo/reviewer experiments.
Fast single-box GPT-OSS GGUF path from the bakeoff. Useful when startup speed matters more than depth.
Preferred GPT-OSS runtime from bakeoff. Frees gx10 and outperformed the TRT baseline.
Large single-box Qwen3.5 GGUF bench path from bakeoff. Slower but strong answer quality.
Heavy single-box bench path. Keep the context conservative to avoid the earlier DGX wedge.
Gemma 4 26B A4B solo large-lane path.
Current fast mini reviewer lane paired with Qwen3.6 and other large-lane sets on :7999.

gguf_coder_next_large.runtime_notes: Best default coding host and bonzai target.

trt_single_gemma4_31b_large.runtime_notes: Retired from live selection after the Gemma 4 26B A4B cutover.

gguf_gemma4_31b_large.runtime_notes: Single-box Gemma 4 31B GGUF lane with local mmproj sidecar for image understanding. Locally verified through 262144 context on one GB10. Fallback for mmproj/vision use cases.

gguf_gemma4_31b_mini.runtime_notes: Retargets the proven Gemma 4 31B GGUF artifact onto the mini lane at 32K context for reviewer use. Do not assume the 64K mini-lane target until a paired large+mini run proves it.

trt_single_qwen3_30b_a3b_mini.runtime_notes: Retired mini TRT lane after moving the fast path to Gemma 4 26B A4B mini.

trt_single_qwen3_32b_mini.runtime_notes: Retired mini TRT lane after moving the fast path to Gemma 4 26B A4B mini.

trt_dual_gpt_oss_120b_large.runtime_notes: Retired from live selection after the GPT-OSS 120B GGUF lane replaced it.

trt_dual_nemotron120_large.runtime_notes: Dual-box TRT lane requested locally. Official model card advertises up to 1M context, but keep the first commune recipe conservative at 65536 tokens until local runs prove the path.

trt_dual_llama33_70b_large.runtime_notes: Dual-box TRT lane. Current stable launcher cap is conservative and should not be treated as the model ceiling.

trt_dual_qwen235_large.runtime_notes: Locally proven once on :8000 with rc3. Keep manual-only until it proves stable again on the exact known-good recipe.

gguf_deepseek_32b_mini.runtime_notes: Reasoning-heavy mini lane kept reserved for Alpha for now.

gguf_qwen36_35b_large.runtime_notes: Bakeoff-proven Qwen3.6 GGUF path on spark. 128K and 262K were both exercised locally.

gguf_gptoss20b_large.runtime_notes: Fastest GPT-OSS single-box GGUF lane from bakeoff.

gguf_gptoss120b_large.runtime_notes: Preferred GPT-OSS lane from bakeoff. Faster startup and simpler ops than dual-box TRT.

gguf_qwen35_122b_large.runtime_notes: Single-box Qwen3.5 122B GGUF bench path. Strong answers, slower startup and throughput.

gguf_minimax_m27_large.runtime_notes: Heavy MiniMax single-box bench path. Keep 16K as the conservative default after the earlier full-context wedge.

gguf_gemma4_26b_a4b_large.runtime_notes: Standalone bakeoff-proven Gemma 4 26B A4B solo path on spark.

gguf_gemma4_26b_a4b_mini.runtime_notes: Current fast mini reviewer lane paired with Qwen3.6 and other large-lane sets.

gguf_qwen36_35b_mini.runtime_notes: Qwen3.6 mini reviewer lane. Added for dual-role combo coverage; keep context conservative until dedicated mini validation is complete.

WizardLM/WizardLM-2-8x22B-AWQ.notes: Installed AWQ MoE. Do not promote until a real vLLM lane exists.

agentica/DeepSWE-Preview-Q4_K_M.notes: Single-box coding GGUF. Not yet wired into the commune controller.

deepseek/DeepSeek-V2.5-1210-AWQ.notes: Installed AWQ checkpoint, but not currently part of the curated lane set.

mistral/Devstral-2-123B-Instruct-2512.notes: Large model with no current commune launcher.

mistral/Mistral-Large-Instruct-2411-AWQ.notes: Installed AWQ checkpoint with no current commune lane.

mistral/Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct-v0.1-AWQ.notes: MoE AWQ path. Keep as inventory until a real vLLM lane is promoted.

mistral/Mixtral-8x22B-Instruct-v0.1-FP8.notes: Installed FP8 path with no commune launcher.

nvidia/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct-FP4.notes: Dual-box TRT lane is locally proven on rc6.

nvidia/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct-NVFP4.notes: Official NVIDIA 8B NVFP4 mini candidate with 128K context on the model card. Downloaded to both boxes; benchmark next.

nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-Nano-9B-v2.notes: Official NVIDIA reasoning mini with 128K context and strong 128K RULER positioning. Downloaded to both boxes; runtime path still needs proving here.

nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B.notes: Official NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super 120B NVFP4 lane wired into the controller as a dual-box TRT target. Model card advertises up to 1M context, but the initial commune recipe stays conservative at 64K until local runs prove it.

nvidia/Qwen3-235B-A22B-NVFP4.notes: Locally proven on :8000 with rc3, but removed from the active lane after a later destabilizing rerun.

nvidia/Qwen3-8B-NVFP4.notes: Official NVIDIA 8B NVFP4 fast mini candidate with 131K context on the model card. Downloaded to both boxes.

nvidia/Qwen3-14B-NVFP4.notes: Official NVIDIA 14B NVFP4 fast/high-context mini candidate with 131K context on the model card. Downloaded to both boxes.

openai/gpt-oss-120b.notes: Best current dual-box production lane on the pair.

other/Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-Instruct-Q4_.notes: Likely easy single-box lane once a second GGUF mini choice is wanted.

google/gemma-4-31B-it.notes: Curated single-box Gemma 4 31B GGUF lane on spark with mmproj sidecar for image understanding. Locally verified at 262144 context on one GB10.

qwen/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B-Q4_K_M.notes: Reasoning-heavy mini GGUF kept reserved for Alpha. Clean isolated retest averaged about 10 tok/s after fixing the mini-lane cleanup race.

qwen/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B-Q6_K.notes: Heavier GGUF variant not wired into the commune controller.

qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct.notes: Too small to matter for the current CLI proof path.

qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct-AWQ.notes: Likely the best AWQ mini coding candidate once a vLLM lane is promoted.

qwen/Qwen2.5-Math-72B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.notes: Large single-box GGUF; not part of the curated controller set.

Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.notes: Bakeoff-proven Qwen3.6 GGUF path on spark. Shared inventory for large and mini reviewer roles.

google/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-GGUF.notes: Gemma 4 26B A4B GGUF inventory backing both solo and reviewer lanes.

candidate_models.notes: Strong single-box bakeoff performer. Wired into the controller as set qwen36.
Bakeoff winner over the TRT path. Wired into the controller as set gptoss120; TRT remains fallback.
Fast single-box GPT-OSS candidate now wired into the controller as set gptoss20.
Strong but slower than the top promote-next models. Wired into the controller as set qwen35-122b.
Keep as a visible bench variant for the Qwen3.5 family.
Interesting bench candidate with acceptable quality but weaker overall promotion signal. Wired into the controller as set minimax-m27 with a conservative 16K default.

candidate_models.recommended_container: nvcr.io/nvidia/vllm:25.11-py3 or newer validated community build
candidate_models.notes: Strongest community-reported two-Spark Qwen235 path. Treat as a separate vLLM track, not a drop-in replacement for the current TRT lane.

candidate_models.recommended_container: nvcr.io/nvidia/vllm:25.11-py3 or newer validated community build
candidate_models.notes: Community-proven two-Spark path with lower throughput than AWQ, but still real.

candidate_models.recommended_container: future TensorRT-LLM release once public artifact path is complete
candidate_models.notes: Official TRT support exists, but the public NVFP4 checkpoint path is still incomplete.

candidate_models.recommended_container: upstream or NVIDIA vLLM build validated against current Spark forum guidance
candidate_models.notes: Real dual-Spark community runs exist. Fit math is plausible on two GX10s, but the path is still too brittle for the active controller.
Very close to Qwen3-235B-A22B in total size and likely fits on two GX10s, but it is still outside the current curated controller set.
Do not promote into the active controller. Published size is too large for a normal two-GX10 fit.
